target.description: C910 CIU priority arbiter, module-local proof/optimization packet

candidate.origin: kairos optimize single-proposal local run with Gemini proposer; local dev license bypass used because this workspace has no signed license file
candidate.boundary: candidate rewrites the priority matrix update structure; visible output proof is for sel[1:0] under reset-first temporal induction

tooling.cache_note: A stale local Yosys liberty SCL cache from another ABC build caused the first pinned area replay to fail; after clearing that derived cache, pinned gold and gate area replays completed.

kairos_selected_generic_cells.source: kairos optimize JSON stdout from the original run

standalone_pinned_generic_stats.note: Standalone proc/opt/memory/opt stats are not the same scoring pass as the Kairos selected generic count.

visible_output_temporal_induction.reset_assumption: rst_b is 0 at time 1 and 1 at time 2
visible_output_temporal_induction.command: read_verilog -formal -sv ct_prio_gold.v ct_prio_gate_candidate.v ct_prio_output_miter.sv; prep -top ct_prio_output_miter; flatten; async2sync; dffunmap; opt; sat -seq 8 -tempinduct -set-at 1 rst_b 0 -set-at 2 rst_b 1 -prove-asserts -verify

negative_control.mutation: changed the gate update condition from if (sel[i] && (i != j)) to if (sel[i])

same_state_equiv_boundary.command: read_verilog -sv ct_prio_gold.v; rename ct_prio gold; read_verilog -sv ct_prio_gate_candidate.v; rename ct_prio_gate gate; proc; opt; memory; opt; async2sync; equiv_make gold gate equiv; hierarchy -top equiv; clean; opt; equiv_simple; equiv_induct -seq 8; equiv_status
same_state_equiv_boundary.interpretation: This backs the non-claim: the packet proves visible sel[1:0] output behavior under the reset-first miter, not full same-state internal priority-state equivalence.

known_non_claims: not full internal-state equivalence; same-state Yosys equiv left internal priority-state bits unproven
not ISA-level, memory-consistency, or speculation-recovery proof

next_independent_check.ask: Reproduce pinned area and output-miter proof on the exact gold/gate pair; pressure-test the output-only proof boundary and negative control.
